author: kerstinlovisa
body:
#### PR description:

This is a backport of the EXOnanoAODv1 content that was previously discussed and merged into CMSSW_17_0_X in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48502.

This PR was created because PPD needs EXOnanoAODv1 backported to CMSSW_16_0_X in order to produce samples with it for central production. In particular, we have one analysis currently waiting for this backport to produce EXOnanoAOD for their signal samples (GitLab signal request PRs: [run 2 PR](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-exo-mci/EXO-MCsampleRequests/-/merge_requests/445), [2022-2023 PR](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-exo-mci/EXO-MCsampleRequests/-/merge_requests/446), and [2024 PR](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-exo-mci/EXO-MCsampleRequests/-/merge_requests/447))

#### PR validation:

Please see https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48502 for validation details.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Original PR: https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48502

Backport to CMSSW_16_0_X.
This PR was created because PPD needs EXOnanoAODv1 backported to CMSSW_16_0_X in order to produce samples with it for central production. In particular, we have one analysis currently waiting for this backport to produce EXOnanoAOD for their signal samples.

@jalimena @jniedzie @Ang-Li-95
title: EXOnanoAODv1 producers and setup (backport of #48502)
